forecast.name: Memorial Day
forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy fog before 8am. Mostly sunny. High near 80, with temperatures falling to around 78 in the afternoon. East northeast wind 0 to 6 mph.

forecast.name: Tonight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 57. South southwest wind 2 to 6 mph.

forecast.detailedForecast: Patchy fog before 8am, then a slight chance of rain showers. Mostly sunny, with a high near 74. Southwest wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nubsNob.comments: Thank-you for a fantastic winter at Nub's Nob! This was a true Northern Michigan winter with 188" of snow and sustained cold. This summer our Crew will be busy replacing our beloved Orange lift with a new fixed grip quad lift from SkyTrac. This lift is built in the USA and will be nearly identical to the new Green lift that was installed in 2023. Thanks for skiing and riding at Nub's Nob.
